channel.title: Database on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in Database on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: azure: [Launched] Generally Available: New Powershell module: Az.PostgreSQLFlexibleServer
item.description:
Azure announced the generally available Az.PostgreSQLFlexibleServer PowerShell module, a renamed module for managing Azure Database for PostgreSQL with PowerShell. It replaces the previous Az.PostgreSql-related module naming with a more streamlined experience.

  • Source: Azure Updates

item.title: azure: [In preview] Public Preview: Azure HorizonDB
item.description:
Azure HorizonDB is in public preview as a PostgreSQL-compatible database service. The preview highlights autoscaling storage up to 128 TB and claimed performance improvements over self-managed PostgreSQL.

  • Source: Azure Updates

item.title: azure: [Launched] Generally Available: Azure Cosmos DB all versions and deletes change feed mode
item.description:
Azure Cosmos DB’s all versions and deletes change feed mode is now generally available. It exposes every change in a container, rather than only the latest state shown by the default mode.

  • Source: Azure Updates
